mapper.insert: INSERT INTO direct_inquiry ( writer_id, admin_id, category, content, answer, answered_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{writerId}, #{adminId}, #{category}, #{content}, #{answer}, #{answeredAt}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT di.id, m.nickname, di.category, di.answer, di.answered_at, di.created_at FROM direct_inquiry di LEFT JOIN member m ON di.writer_id = m.id ORDER BY di.created_at ${order}

SELECT di.id, m.nickname, di.category, di.answer, di.answered_at, di.created_at FROM direct_inquiry di LEFT JOIN member m ON di.writer_id = m.id WHERE di.writer_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY di.created_at ${order}

SELECT di.id, m.nickname AS writerNickname, di.category, di.content, di.answer, am.nickname AS adminNickname, di.answered_at AS answeredAt, di.created_at AS createdAt FROM direct_inquiry di JOIN member m ON di.writer_id = m.id LEFT JOIN member am ON di.admin_id = am.id WHERE di.id = #{inquiryId}

SELECT di.id, m.nickname AS writerNickname, di.category, di.content, di.answer, am.nickname AS adminNickname, di.answered_at AS answeredAt, di.created_at AS createdAt FROM direct_inquiry di JOIN member m ON di.writer_id = m.id LEFT JOIN member am ON di.admin_id = am.id WHERE di.id = #{inquiryId} AND di.writer_id = #{memberId}
mapper.update: UPDATE direct_inquiry SET admin_id = #{adminId}, answer = #{answer}, answered_at = #{answeredAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND answer IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT id, writer_id AS writerId, admin_id AS adminId, category, content, answer, answered_at AS answeredAt, created_at AS createdAt FROM direct_inquiry WHERE id = #{id}
